inicio.dialogo.02: No, I already told you, if we don't get someone for the show, we're going down.
inicio.dialogo.04: But who do we have in this beautiful place.
inicio.dialogo.06: Oh my God, it's real, you're a real person
inicio.dialogo.07: This could be the beginning of something truly incredible.
inicio.dialogo.08: Ah, forgive me, dear specimen, I haven't even introduced myself properly, my apologies.
inicio.dialogo.09: My name is Tenna, Ant Tenna, and I am a Show host!, nice to meet you, uhhh.., uhhhhh....
inicio.dialogo.10: Ahhh, right, you still haven't told me your name, so, what is your name, my dear child?
inicio.dialogo.12: So your name is {0}, right? What a great name!
inicio.dialogo.13: Don't worry, nobody's going to eat you, this place only exists when a person enters, meaning I've been alive for about 4 minutes.
inicio.dialogo.14: If the show goes wrong, don't blame me. Technically, in terms of cognitive development, I am a freshly cut fruit.
inicio.dialogo.16: OH MY GOD! You don't even know who I'm talking to, do you? Allow me a moment.
inicio.dialogo.18: Now we've set the mood, there's just one more thing to do.
inicio.dialogo.19: I need someone special and willing to participate in my show, and YOU my friend are the one.
inicio.dialogo.20: So, what do you say? Feel like participating in this wonderful event you know nothing about?
inicio.dialogo.22: Well, whichever button you press, it's the same thing, our creator didn't want to complicate things, right?
inicio.dialogo.24: So, without further ado, let's begin, Welcome, to the Digital Escape Room!
spamton.completado.01: You already solved my riddle, what else do you want?
spamton.completado.02: Go bother someone else, I already did my part.
spamton.02: YOU ARE the person the TV with a head was talking about
spamton.03: Well, not that it surprises me, I was just interested in a new client
spamton.04: Anyway, our TV with legs demanded we give you some riddles before the opening show, so, are you ready?
jevil.completado.01: We already played, don't you remember?
jevil.01: HELLO HELLO HELLO, DO YOU WANT TO PLAY A GAME? YES, YES!
jevil.02: PLEASE TELL ME YES, I'VE BEEN WAITING FOR THIS FOR YEARS
jevil.03: I've been here for decades, I don't even know my own name
napsta.completado.01: Oh, you found what I was looking for...
napsta.completado.02: Thanks, I guess. I don't know what else to say.
napsta.01: Oh, hi, I'm a ghost, I don't even know why I'm here
napsta.03: Hm? Tenna said to give you a game?
napsta.04: Oh no, I don't have a game for you, oh no...
napsta.05: Well, I've been trying to find something in my room, can you help me?
roulx.completado.02: I have no more games for you, go see the others.
roulx.01: HELLO HOW ARE YOU I'M SO GLAD!
roulx.02: Ahhh, sorry, I've been waiting so long for someone that I got nervous
roulx.04: Well anyway, my name is Roulx Kaard, it makes more sense in English
roulx.05: Our creator didn't want to do it in English either, well, what more can we ask
roulx.06: Anyway, my friend over there told us to entertain you a bit, so, are you ready?
tenna2.completado.01: OH MY GOD, YOU COMPLETED ALL THE LEVELS!
tenna2.completado.02: But I didn't even get my 5 minute break
tenna2.completado.04: Well, it seems you're quite the riddle expert now, aren't you?
tenna2.completado.05: Don't worry, you're almost done with this game, just the final challenge left
tenna2.completado.06: So, are you ready for the final challenge?
tenna2.02: Look, the game I have is very interesting, and you're going to love it
tenna2.03: However, we're still having some technical issues with the game, so...
tenna2.04: How about visiting my other friends? It seems they have other games to entertain you
tenna2.05: Meanwhile I'll try to figure out what's going on over there, okay?

nerd.acertijo:
A lion is hiding in one of three rooms.. 
Knowing that only one of these statements is true, which room is the lion in?(1,2 or 3)
nerd.exito:
WOW! YOU DID IT!! Well 
done, you finally managed 
to solve this riddle!
nerd.fail:
Well, maybe math 
isn't for everyone...
tercera.dialogo.02: So, you managed to solve all my colleagues' riddles, I must say I'm very impressed.
tercera.dialogo.03: There has only been one person who has been able to solve those riddles, and that's ME.
tercera.dialogo.04: So, are you ready? I'm going to ask you several questions, and you're going to answer each and every one.
tercera.dialogo.05: They will all be open-ended, with no limit on attempts.
tercera.dialogo.06: So, without further ado, let's begin!
tercera.p01: Walking at the end of the afternoon, a lady counted 20 houses on a street to her right. On the way back, she counted 20 houses to her left. How many houses did she see in total?
tercera.p02: How many months of the year have 28 days?
tercera.p03: If a brick weighs one kilo plus half a brick, how much does a brick weigh?
tercera.p04: A guard says 8, the guest answers 4. The guard says 14 and the guest says 7. If the guard says 18, what should the guest answer?
tercera.p05: What is the number that, if you remove half of it, becomes zero?
tercera.p06: A man has 17 cows. All but nine die. How many cows does he have left?
tercera.p07: How many pieces of cake can you cut, at most, with just 3 straight cuts?
tercera.p08: A father and son are 36 years old together. The father is 30 years older than the son. How old is the son?
tercera.p09: If 3 flies catch 3 spiders in 3 minutes, how many minutes will it take one fly to catch one spider?
tercera.p10: If a duck costs $9, a spider costs $36 and a bee costs $27. Following that same logic, how much does a dog cost?
tercera.p11: You are on the middle step of a staircase. You go up 3 steps, down 5 and then up 10. If at that moment you are on the last step, how many steps does the staircase have in total?
tercera.p12: In a family there are 2 fathers and 2 sons, but there are only 3 people. How is that possible? (Tell me the number of grandparents there are).
tercera.correcto: Correct! You have {0} out of {1} needed.
tercera.ganaste: You got {0} correct answers! You win!
tercera.resultado:
You got {0}/{1} correct answers.
You needed {2} to win!
